objective: Collect a no-secret local toolchain inventory, create a software purpose map, and propose a gated software install recommendation package.
rule: WSL is optional for Local backend and must not block Starter when local terminal works.
rules: WSL is optional for Local backend and must not block Starter when local terminal works.
Stage 3 proposes install commands only; it never installs software without a separate explicit owner install gate.
Every checked tool must include purpose and agent_use so the agent knows what it has and why it matters.
Docker and WSL are optional/deferred unless the user selects container or Linux workflows.
